sampled_assertions.assertion: AI agent puts a foundation model at the centre of an active multi-step process
Three properties separate an agent from a plain LLM: actions / loop / memory
New paragraph: agents vs LLMs — goal-level description of difference
Short-term memory lives in context window; long-term memory in external storage
RAG is one specific way of pulling long-term memory into the context window
Tool examples: web search, code executor, calendar, file reader/writer, API call
New paragraph: loop simplicity insight — complexity from iteration, not single-step elaboration
Design principle: goals not scripts; new goal-vs-script contrast example
Agentic workflow: goal specified by user, agent sequences its own actions
